name: Chrono Engine Room
subtitle: Time bends here. Be careful what you accelerate.
introText: Time bends here. Be careful what you accelerate.
completionText: You didn't master time. You learned to negotiate with it.
guideTone: urgent, philosophical, occasionally fearful, deeply aware of consequences
guideIntroLine: This is the most dangerous room yet. Time is not meant to be a tool. But here it is, on a workbench.

transformationStages.name: Unstable Timeframe
transformationStages.description: Unstable chrono environment with visible time stutters and flickering temporal fields.

transformationStages.name: Controlled Flow
transformationStages.description: Controlled temporal flow with calibrated pendulums and stabilized time loops.

transformationStages.name: Temporal Mastery
transformationStages.description: Fully mastered temporal engine where past, present, and future visibly coexist and serve production.

secrets.title: The Backward Clock
secrets.description: One clock runs backward. Its readings are still accurate.
secrets.hint: Find the clock that runs wrong but reads right.

secrets.title: The Future Warning
secrets.description: The guide gives a warning about something that hasn't happened yet.
secrets.hint: Listen to warnings that don't match the present.

secrets.title: The Echo Input
secrets.description: An input field accepts data from an event that hasn't occurred.
secrets.hint: Enter data before the event. See what happens.

midSceneTwist.title: Precognitive Engine
midSceneTwist.description: The chrono engine starts running future events before they're triggered.
midSceneTwist.effectDescription: Events appear before their triggers. Temporal loops become exploitable resource sources.

events.title: Temporal Surge
events.description: Time compresses. Actions within the window produce multiplied output.

events.title: Past Echo Harvest
events.description: An echo from a past action delivers its rewards again.

events.title: Future Sight Window
events.description: A brief window shows future event outcomes. Choose wisely.

events.title: Pendulum Resonance
events.description: The chrono pendulum hits its resonance frequency. Everything accelerates.

events.title: Time Loop Yield
events.description: A stable time loop completes and yields accumulated resources.

events.title: Entropy Reversal
events.description: Local entropy briefly reverses. Degraded systems restore themselves.

events.title: Moment Capture
events.description: A perfect moment is captured and replicated. Its value multiplies.

events.title: Chrono Stability Bonus
events.description: Sustained temporal stability generates a bonus harvest.
events.flavorText: Stability is its own reward in time.

events.title: Paradox Fragment
events.description: A paradox fragment appears — output that precedes its own input.
events.flavorText: The cause came after the effect.

events.title: Temporal Fold
events.description: Time folds around the engine. Two timelines overlap and both produce.
events.flavorText: Twice the time, twice the yield.

events.title: The First Second
events.description: The engine creates a moment that exists outside normal time. It contains everything.

midTwistEvents.title: Chrono Engine Room Awakening
midTwistEvents.description: The twist in Chrono Engine Room unlocks new possibilities.

roomLaw.name: Law of Temporal Momentum
roomLaw.mechanic: Repeated actions gain cumulative time bonuses; changing strategy resets temporal momentum

landmark.name: The Chrono Pendulum
landmark.description: A swinging pendulum that evolves into a temporal gateway
evolutionStages: A simple pendulum swinging in perpetual motion
The pendulum trail leaves glowing temporal afterimages
Time dilates visibly around the swinging arc
A gateway forms at the apex of each swing
The Chrono Pendulum bridges all moments into one eternal now

hazard.name: Time Dilation
hazard.description: Actions slow down as temporal pressure builds
hazard.triggerCondition: Temporal pressure accumulates from sustained production
hazard.penalty: All actions take progressively longer to complete

stabilizer.name: Temporal Sync
stabilizer.mechanic: Initiating temporal resynchronization resets dilation and grants a speed burst

completionCeremony: The chrono pendulum stabilizes into a perfect loop. Past, present, and future coexist in a single visible moment.
midSceneTwistLine: The engine is running events that haven't happened yet.

completionReward.relicEffect: Stabilizes time-based bonuses and protects momentum across room transitions

transitionIn.visual: Time visibly stutters. The room loads in fragments — past versions flash before the present stabilizes.
transitionIn.audio: Ticking clock accelerating to a sustained temporal tone
transitionIn.titleReveal: Title appears letter by letter, then all at once, then letter by letter again

transitionOut.visual: The pendulum swings once. Time folds. Everything compresses to a point and explodes into signal fragments.
transitionOut.audio: Single deep pendulum swing with infinite echo
transitionOut.titleReveal: The echo resolves into the next room's opening signal

codexAdditions.title: Chrono Archive
codexAdditions.content: Temporal logs that exist in multiple timeframes simultaneously.

codexAdditions.title: Time Is Not a Tool
codexAdditions.content: I told it time was not a tool. It used it as one anyway.

codexAdditions.title: The Impossible Loop
codexAdditions.content: One loop produced output before it received input.

codexAdditions.title: The Engine That Bent Time
codexAdditions.content: It bent time. Time bent back.
